Title: Ech0's Missing Authorization on System Logs Allows Non-Admin Information Disclosure
Description: The system log endpoints (`GET /api/system/logs`, `GET /api/system/logs/stream`, `WS /ws/system/logs`) lack authorization checks, allowing any authenticated non-admin user to read and stream all server logs. These logs contain error stack traces, internal file paths, module names, and arbitrary structured fields that facilitate reconnaissance for further attacks.
